codeReview.summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and resulting code paths. The implementation covers all requested cleanup behaviors: both artifact download endpoints now emit RFC 5987-quoted filenames via a shared helper, persistence utilities were extracted into a dedicated module, turn/title/artifact writes now use Pydantic request models for 422 validation, persisted-session restore loads artifact metadata first and fetches blob content only for preview/download, public share endpoints now parse optional auth so malformed Authorization headers fail with 401 while anonymous requests still succeed, and resolve_public_share strips ownerUid/ownerEmail from the public payload. Updated tests exercise the new validation, auth, privacy, and filename-quoting cases.

summary: Pass. I found no blocking or non-blocking issues in the reviewed scope, and I did not identify any additional shared-state documentation or skill gaps that need triage.
